issues.detail: The skill does not address scenarios where the user provides incomplete copy or missing context.
The skill references a .claude-specific file path, limiting use to Claude agents.

scenarios.name: seven-sweeps-landing-page-edit
scenarios.rationale: Response A better applies the sweeps and annotations, but lacks explicit recheck statement; Response B fails to apply the framework.

scenarios.name: quick-pass-tweet-polish
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets all rubric criteria with detailed explanations, while Response A lacks the required edit explanations.
